original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 3 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH america_suppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s_suppkey, 
        s_acctbal, 
        s_name, 
        s_address, 
        s_phone, 
        s_comment, 
        s_nationkey
    FROM supplier
    JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
    WHERE region.r_name = 'AMERICA'
),
min_costs AS (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_supplycost
    FROM partsupp
    JOIN america_suppliers ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = america_suppliers.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
    a.s_acctbal, 
    a.s_name, 
    n.n_name, 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_mfgr, 
    a.s_address, 
    a.s_phone, 
    a.s_comment
FROM part p
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN america_suppliers a ON ps.ps_suppkey = a.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON a.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN min_costs mc ON 
    mc.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey 
    AND ps.ps_supplycost = mc.min_supplycost
WHERE 
    p.p_size = 3 
    AND p.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
ORDER BY 
    a.s_acctbal DESC, 
    n.n_name, 
    a.s_name, 
    p.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced correlated subquery with CTEs to avoid repeated execution
Created america_suppliers CTE to avoid redundant joins to nation and region tables
Pre-computed minimum supply costs per part with min_costs CTE
Used table aliases to improve readability and maintainability
